data.name: Sakura

weaponImprint.name: Crimson Covenant
weaponImprint.trait: If a weakness is exploited, ignores 10% of the target's defense. If a Burn weakness is exploited, ignores an additional 10% of the target's defense.
weaponImprint.effect: Burn Damage is increased by 15%/18%/21%/24%/27%/30%. Each time an out-of-turn attack is launched, the damage of out-of-turn attacks is increased by 7%/8%/9%/10%/11%/12%, to a maximum of 14%/16%/18%/20%/22%/24%.
weaponImprint.imprintDescription: Damage dealt to targets with Burn debuffs is increased by 2.5%, and damage dealt to PMC units is increased by 2.5%.

data.effects:
As both founder and courier of "Ouka Kyuso", she is primarily active in the satellite cities and contaminated zones around them. Together with her vehicle navigation system "colleague", they aim to make life a better place for the locals through speedy and efficient deliveries. Despite being introverted and unfortunate, her hardworking and diligent attitude has earned her the title of "Ace Courier". While she has grown into a capable professional, what truly makes her happy is the fact that she will be able to walk her future path with you by her side.
"If all this hard work wins me praise from the Commander... Then I guess I can work a little harder?"

skills.name: Sakura Chime
skills.description: Selects one enemy target within 7 tiles, dealing Physical damage equal to 80% of attack to it.

skills.name: Felicitous Prayer
skills.description:
At the start of battle, gains [effect:137fa391-c1aa-4777-bb43-278f788a6aac]. When the effect of [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] is triggered without using the Ultimate skill [dollSkill:f25d838f-ea8b-46cc-a8bd-c5dcd52f38db], gains 2 points of [effect:9f893006-1231-4255-b5c9-9a373aa441a2].

At the start of the turn, Sakura gains 2 points of Confectance Index and applies 2 stacks of [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] to 3 random enemies on the battlefield. If Sakura has [effect:75fd2660-90d0-4026-9703-b80071294145], damage dealt is increased by 20%.
skills.descriptionLevel2:
At the start of battle, gains [effect:137fa391-c1aa-4777-bb43-278f788a6aac]. When the effect of [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] is triggered without using the Ultimate skill [dollSkill:f25d838f-ea8b-46cc-a8bd-c5dcd52f38db], gains 2 points of [effect:9f893006-1231-4255-b5c9-9a373aa441a2].

At the start of the turn, Sakura gains 2 points of Confectance Index and applies 2 stacks of [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] to 5 random enemies on the battlefield. If Sakura has [effect:75fd2660-90d0-4026-9703-b80071294145], damage dealt is increased by 20%.

If the enemy is standing on a Burn tile, the damage dealt by [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] is increased by 30%.
skills.descriptionLevel3:
At the start of battle, gains [effect:137fa391-c1aa-4777-bb43-278f788a6aac]. When the effect of [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] is triggered without using the Ultimate skill [dollSkill:f25d838f-ea8b-46cc-a8bd-c5dcd52f38db], gains 2 points of [effect:9f893006-1231-4255-b5c9-9a373aa441a2].

At the start of the turn, Sakura gains 2 points of Confectance Index and applies 2 stacks of [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] to 5 random enemies on the battlefield. If Sakura has [effect:75fd2660-90d0-4026-9703-b80071294145], damage dealt is increased by 50% and critical damage is increased by 25%.

When an enemy unit gains [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922], generates [effect:f793ed02-a490-4ac2-849a-689c57001678] tiles within 1 tile of it for 3 turns. If the enemy is standing on a Burn tile, the damage dealt by [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] is increased by 30%.

When [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] deals damage, it ignores 15% of the target's defense.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect:
The number of enemy targets who will randomly gain [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] is increased to 5. The damage multiplier of [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] is increased to 90% and its effective range is increased by 1 tile.

If the enemy is standing on a Burn tile, the damage dealt by [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] is increased by 30%.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect:
If Sakura has [effect:75fd2660-90d0-4026-9703-b80071294145], damage dealt is increased by 50% and critical damage by 25%.

When an enemy unit gains [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922], generate [effect:f793ed02-a490-4ac2-849a-689c57001678] tiles within 1 tile of it for 3 turns.

When [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] deals damage, it ignores 15% of the target's defense.

skills.name: Falling Blossom
skills.description: Selects an empty tile within 2 tiles of an allied Doll or an enemy target with [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922]. Sakura jumps to the selected tile, deals AoE Burn damage equal to 60% of attack to all enemy targets within a 2 tiles of the selected tile and gains [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects an empty tile within 3 tiles of an allied Doll or an enemy target with [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922]. Sakura jumps to the selected tile, deals AoE Burn damage equal to 75% of attack to all enemy targets within a 3 tiles of the selected tile and gains [effect:c1feeb2a-d9a9-4a73-9703-8806ee8cb9eb].

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: The selectable range for Sakura to jump is increased by 1 tile. AoE damage's effective range is increased by 1 tile, damage multiplier is increased by 15%, and Confectance Index cost is reduced by 1 point.

skills.name: Misfortune Delivery
skills.description: Selects an enemy target within 7 tiles, deals Burn damage equal to 130% of attack and applies 2 stacks of [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] to it. Before the attack resolves, additionally applies [effect:9223f1cf-7f46-4b8e-ab15-e263375cf18e] to the target for 3 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects an enemy target within 7 tiles, deals Burn damage equal to 130% of attack and applies 3 stacks of [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] to it. Before the attack resolves, additionally applies [effect:9223f1cf-7f46-4b8e-ab15-e263375cf18e] to the target for 3 turns.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Selects 1 enemy target within 7 tiles and deals Burn damage equal to 130% of attack to it and apply 3 stacks of [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922]. Before the attack, apply [effect:9223f1cf-7f46-4b8e-ab15-e263375cf18e] to the target for 2 turns.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Number of [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] stacks applied is increased to 3. Damage multiplier from [effect:9223f1cf-7f46-4b8e-ab15-e263375cf18e] is increased to 30%.

skills.name: Grand Isekai Adventure
skills.description: Selects a direction, then deals AoE Burn damage equal to 90% of attack and applies 3 stacks of [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] to all enemy units in a 3x10 tile area in front. After this skill resolves, triggers the effects of all [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] stacks, Sakura gains [effect:75fd2660-90d0-4026-9703-b80071294145] for 2 turns and 2 points of Confectance Index.
skills.descriptionLevel2: Selects a direction, then deals AoE Burn damage equal to 120% of attack and applies 3 stacks of [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] to all enemy targets in a 5x10 area in front. In addition, all enemy units with [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] have this effect stacked to its maximum count. After this skill resolves, triggers the effects of all [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] stacks, Sakura gains [effect:75fd2660-90d0-4026-9703-b80071294145] for 2 turns and 2 points of Confectance Index.
skills.descriptionLevel3: Selects a direction, then deals AoE Burn damage equal to 120% of attack and applies 3 stacks of [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] to all enemy targets in a 5x10 area in front. In addition, all enemy units with [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] have this effect stacked to its maximum count. After this skill resolves, triggers the effects of all [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] stacks, Sakura gains [effect:75fd2660-90d0-4026-9703-b80071294145] for 2 turns and 2 points of Confectance Index.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel2.effect: Damage multiplier is increased by 30%, effective range is increased to a 5x10 area in front, and all enemy units with [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] have this effect stacked to its maximum count.

vertebraeUpgradeLevel3.effect: [effect:75fd2660-90d0-4026-9703-b80071294145] gains a new effect: Before an allied unit makes an active attack or out-of-turn attack (excluding Sakura herself), Sakura applies 1 stack of [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] to the target. This effect can trigger up to 3 times per turn.

keys.effect: AoE damage dealt to enemy targets with debuffs is increased by 10%.
At the start of the battle, Sakura applies 1 stack of [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] to 3 random enemies on the battlefield.
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 1 - Hard Work and Guts

keys.effect:
When [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] is not applied by her Ultimate skill, Sakura applies [effect:71b3f790-db3b-4188-a3d7-15fa9752b57a] for 1 turn.

Dandegate Note: Correct translation is "When applying Sakura Mark with non-Ultimate skills (including passive), Sakura additionally applies Overburn for 1 turn."
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 2 - Just in Time Logistics

keys.effect: When applying [effect:9223f1cf-7f46-4b8e-ab15-e263375cf18e], cleanses one buff from the target.
keys.displayTitle: Fixed Key 3 - Apologies From the Heart

keys.effect: At the start of the battle, Sakura applies [effect:9223f1cf-7f46-4b8e-ab15-e263375cf18e] for 3 turns to the enemy unit with the highest HP.
At the end of the turn, if there is any enemy unit within 3 tiles, Sakura gains 1 stack of [effect:af640815-bbef-471b-8888-cee6c3d8b4a4].
When an enemy unit with [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] dies, attack is increased by 4%, to a maximum of 20%.

vertebrae.effect:
The number of enemy targets who will randomly gain [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] is increased to 5. The damage multiplier of [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] is increased to 90% and its effective range is increased by 1 tile.

If the enemy is standing on a Burn tile, the damage dealt by [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] is increased by 30%.

doll.name: Sakura
doll.effects:
As both founder and courier of "Ouka Kyuso", she is primarily active in the satellite cities and contaminated zones around them. Together with her vehicle navigation system "colleague", they aim to make life a better place for the locals through speedy and efficient deliveries. Despite being introverted and unfortunate, her hardworking and diligent attitude has earned her the title of "Ace Courier". While she has grown into a capable professional, what truly makes her happy is the fact that she will be able to walk her future path with you by her side.
"If all this hard work wins me praise from the Commander... Then I guess I can work a little harder?"

doll.name: Sakura
doll.effects:
As both founder and courier of "Ouka Kyuso", she is primarily active in the satellite cities and contaminated zones around them. Together with her vehicle navigation system "colleague", they aim to make life a better place for the locals through speedy and efficient deliveries. Despite being introverted and unfortunate, her hardworking and diligent attitude has earned her the title of "Ace Courier". While she has grown into a capable professional, what truly makes her happy is the fact that she will be able to walk her future path with you by her side.
"If all this hard work wins me praise from the Commander... Then I guess I can work a little harder?"

skillsLevel3.name: Grand Isekai Adventure
skillsLevel3.description: Selects a direction, then deals AoE Burn damage equal to 90% of attack and applies 3 stacks of [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] to all enemy units in a 3x10 tile area in front. After this skill resolves, triggers the effects of all [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] stacks, Sakura gains [effect:75fd2660-90d0-4026-9703-b80071294145] for 2 turns and 2 points of Confectance Index.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel2: Selects a direction, then deals AoE Burn damage equal to 120% of attack and applies 3 stacks of [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] to all enemy targets in a 5x10 area in front. In addition, all enemy units with [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] have this effect stacked to its maximum count. After this skill resolves, triggers the effects of all [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] stacks, Sakura gains [effect:75fd2660-90d0-4026-9703-b80071294145] for 2 turns and 2 points of Confectance Index.
skillsLevel3.descriptionLevel3: Selects a direction, then deals AoE Burn damage equal to 120% of attack and applies 3 stacks of [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] to all enemy targets in a 5x10 area in front. In addition, all enemy units with [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] have this effect stacked to its maximum count. After this skill resolves, triggers the effects of all [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] stacks, Sakura gains [effect:75fd2660-90d0-4026-9703-b80071294145] for 2 turns and 2 points of Confectance Index.

imagoforms.effect: Damage dealt to enemy units with Burn debuffs is increased by 5%.
Physical and phase damage taken is reduced by 5%.
Burn damage dealt is increased by 5%.
Damage dealt to enemy targets with 50% or lower HP is increased by 10%.
The damage of attacks which hit 2 or more enemy units is increased by 12%.

dollEffects.effectDetails:
{"mainDetails":"

Damage taken from [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] is increased by 10%. Considered a Burn debuff, cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"c30f8d49-cf6e-4229-aee8-a2ebe8400ccc","upgradeName":"V4","upgradeDetails":"

","order":0}]}

{"mainDetails":"

Before making an active attack, applies 1 stack of [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] to the target. Cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"de7c2f25-75bf-41db-ab4f-8dc8821595f2","upgradeName":"V6","upgradeDetails":"

Before making an active attack, applies 1 stack of [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] to the target. Before an allied unit (excluding Sakura herself) makes an active attack or an out-of-turn attack, Sakura applies 1 stack of [effect:633a31d3-52cd-4845-9247-e1c9ab33c922] to the target. This can only be triggered a maximum of 3 times per turn. Cannot be cleansed.

","order":0}]}

{"mainDetails":"

When this unit take Burn damage, expends 1 stack of this effect; Sakura deals AoE Burn damage equal to 60% of attack to this unit and all enemies within 2 tiles of it. If this effect is triggered by Sakura's Ultimate Skill [dollSkill:f25d838f-ea8b-46cc-a8bd-c5dcd52f38db], expends 3 stacks of this effect and deals AoE Burn damage equal to 180% of attack to this unit and all enemies within 2 tiles of it. Stacks up to 3 times. Cannot be cleansed.

","upgrades":[{"id":"c658b8c5-9df1-4616-a760-a0bc21b378c3","upgradeName":"V1","upgradeDetails":"

When this unit take Burn damage, expends 1 stack of this effect; Sakura deals AoE Burn damage equal to 90% of attack to this unit and all enemies within 3 tiles of it. If this effect is triggered by Sakura's Ultimate Skill [dollSkill:f25d838f-ea8b-46cc-a8bd-c5dcd52f38db], expends 3 stacks of this effect and deals AoE Burn damage equal to 270% of attack to this unit and all enemies within 3 tiles of it. Stacks up to 3 times. Cannot be cleansed.

","order":0}]}
